## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check src tests` passes
- [ ] `mypy src/shadowshield` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] New behavior has tests (a new attack pattern includes a regression test that
      **fails before** and **passes after** this change)
- [ ] Docs / CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
